## 🌍 Translation Submission

| **Document** |  |
| **Language** |  |
| **Language Code** |  |

### Translation Notes
<!-- Any notes about your translation approach, context, or decisions -->


---

### Submission Checklist

- [ ] File is in the correct `translations/` subdirectory
- [ ] File name follows the convention: `FILENAME.LANG_CODE.md`
- [ ] Translation is **human-made** (not pure machine translation)
- [ ] Original document structure is maintained
- [ ] All links and references are intact
- [ ] File uses UTF-8 encoding
- [ ] Grammar and spelling are correct
- [ ] Only `.md` files are included

### Confirmation

- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Contributing Guide](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)

---

> ✅ Translation PRs can be **auto-merged** if all checks pass!
